layouts.desc: Single icon centred on canvas. For hero moments or any sentence with one core concept.

params.effects: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []

layouts.desc: Two icons side by side. For pairs or soft comparisons. Left = negative/before, right = positive/after.

params.effects_left: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []
params.effects_right: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []

layouts.desc: Two icons split by a centre divider. For explicit A vs B contrast. Left = bad/wrong, right = good/correct.

params.effects_left: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []
params.effects_right: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []

layouts.desc: Up to 3 icons revealed one after another left to right with staggered delay. For steps, lists, or feature reveals.

params.effects_each: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []

layouts.desc: One large central icon surrounded by smaller support icons in orbit. For ecosystems, hub-and-spoke, or a main concept with related features.

params.effects_main: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []
params.effects_support: list[effect_entry] - Examples: ['pulse'] [('pulse', 1.0)] first is name and second is when should it take place — default []
